ddls:
CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "peptide_sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the peptide */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein associated with the peptide */,
  "binding_level" TEXT /* Level of binding affinity indication (e.g., SB, WB) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the peptide was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the peptide */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the peptide was obtained */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the peptide is active or deprecated */,
  "annotations" TEXT /* JSON column to store multiple annotations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the protein is derived */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the protein was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the protein */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the protein was obtained */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the protein is active or deprecated */,
  "annotations" TEXT /* JSON column to store multiple annotations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "binding_affinities" (
  "affinity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each binding affinity entry */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide associated with this binding affinity */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the peptide in the protein sequence */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the peptide in the protein sequence */,
  "percentile_rank" REAL /* Percentile rank of the binding score */,
  "logscore" REAL /* Logarithmic score of binding affinity */,
  "affinity" REAL /* Affinity measurement of the peptide */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the binding affinity data was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the binding affinity data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment where this binding affinity was measured */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the binding affinity data was obtained */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the binding affinity data is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affinity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binding_affinities_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binding_affinities_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binding_affinities_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name/description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the experiment is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Research institution or department affiliation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the researcher */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the researcher is active or deprecated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, technician) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the protocol */,
  "protocol_description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental protocol */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment using this protocol */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the protocol was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the protocol */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the protocol is active or deprecated */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocols_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this result */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide tested in this result */,
  "binding_affinity" REAL /* Measured binding affinity for this peptide */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the result is active or deprecated */,
  "annotations" TEXT /* JSON column to store multiple annotations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text describing the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the annotation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the annotation is active or deprecated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the annotation was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the data source is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher associated with these permissions */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can edit data */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can view data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the permission is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the log entry is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide that this version relates to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the peptide data */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the version is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)
